title: Daily Randomized Team, Training Calculator, and other changes

texts: Added the Daily Randomized Team page: A new randomized team every day. Use it for MDs or other content.
Added the Dispense and Training Calculator: Select the identities and E.G.Os you want to dispense or upgrade. The calculator can compute the number of runs and modules needed to get the resources.
Added the Timers page: A set of timers for the ends of events or resets as well as counters for how long the most recent releases are.
Theme Packs: Added a floor filter.
Theme Packs: Adjusted the sizes of the theme packs on mobile to make the page easier to navigate.
Added and adjusted titles to most pages on the site.
Adjusted titles on MD Plans in their display cards.
Added left/right margins on sinner notes so they don't end up too close to each other.
Adjusted the text on a number of places on the site.
